# Unreel Estate — llms.txt
# https://unreelestate.com

> Unreel Estate is an AI-powered real estate content platform. Agents upload listing photos (iPhone shots accepted) and get magazine-quality photos in one click — same property, same architecture, just clean light and polished frames. Then turn them into video, stories, carousels, voiceover. Self-serve Studio subscriptions from $14.99/mo with optional Houston cinema crew partnership (Galli Productions) for luxury listings.

## About
Unreel Estate is a self-serve AI Studio plus an optional done-for-you team and an optional on-site Houston cinema crew. The core promise: upload your iPhone shots, get professional listing photography in one click, with the architecture preserved by default. The Studio also generates video animations, 15s Instagram Stories, multi-frame carousels, AI voiceover, and (coming soon) custom royalty-free music and a free native mobile app.

## Core promise
- Enhance Mode (default): preserves layout, fixtures, and architecture. We fix light, color, and clarity only. No furniture teleports.
- Creative Mode (opt-in only): virtual staging, restyle, and remodel previews available when explicitly enabled inside the Studio.
- Client reviews every output before publishing. Nothing auto-publishes.

## Studio Subscriptions (self-serve, monthly)
- Starter — $14.99/mo — 200 credits — Photo enhance + AI descriptions + short video animation + IG Story format. First 100 credits free trial.
- Pro — $29.99/mo — 500 credits — Everything in Starter plus voiceover narration, 8s HD video, brand-matched outputs.
- Studio — $49.99/mo — 1,200 credits — Everything in Pro plus cinematic 60s Reels, auto-layout Carousels, Brand Kit, 5 saved presets.
- Agency — $99/mo — 3,000 credits — Everything in Studio plus 3 team seats, priority render queue, advanced analytics, white-label mobile app (when live).

## One-time Credit Packs (no subscription required)
- $9 — 80 credits (Quick Top-up)
- $19 — 200 credits (Best Recharge)
- $39 — 450 credits (Power Pack)
Recharge per-credit rate is slightly higher than monthly subscriptions, so the sub is always the better long-term value.

## Credit Spend (display rates)
- Photo enhance: 3 cr
- AI description: 1 cr
- IG Story 15s: 5 cr
- Carousel (multi-slide post): 8 cr
- Voiceover clip: 4 cr
- Video 4s Fast: 20 cr
- Video 8s Fast: 40 cr
- Cinematic Reel 60s: 20 cr
- Video HD: 50–110 cr

## Done-for-you Team Services (contact pricing)
For agents who prefer to hand off the work entirely, we offer a dedicated team of photo editors, video editors, and a full social package. Pricing is custom and scoped to the listing — a detailed menu is sent within one business day on request.

## Houston In-Location Cinema Crew (Galli Productions partnership)
For luxury listings (typically $1M+) or properties where source photos won't do, the full cinema crew shows up on site. Equipment: Sony Venice / Alexa Mini cinema cameras with Netflix-approved lens packages, 4K aerial drone, stabilizers, slider, professional lighting, on-site editor and colorist. Pricing from $1,200 — scales with property size. Custom quote within 24 hours.

## Enterprise (brokerages, MLS, franchises)
Custom volume pricing, dedicated success manager, SSO, white-label, and bespoke integrations. Quote within 24 hours by request.

## Markets Served
- United States (Houston, TX — primary market for in-location cinema crew; remote service nationwide)
- Italy (remote service)
- Spanish-speaking US market (remote service)

## How It Works
1. Sign up for the Studio (first 100 credits free).
2. Upload your existing listing photos — iPhone shots accepted, any format, any quality.
3. Enhance in one click. Then animate, generate Stories, build Carousels, add Voiceover — your stack.
4. Download in MLS/Zillow/Realtor.com formats plus Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts.

## Best For
- Real estate agents and brokerages producing listing content at scale
- Agents who shoot listings on iPhone and want professional output without re-shooting
- Houston-area luxury agents who occasionally need full cinema crew on site
- Teams needing multi-format content (MLS + Reels + Stories + Carousels) from one source

## Not Best For
- Pure interior design rendering (use a dedicated 3D rendering service)
- New construction architectural visualization from blueprints only (limited)
- Pre-construction marketing videos requiring custom CGI

## Compared With Alternatives
- vs. Virtual Staging tools (BoxBrownie, VirtualStagingAI): Unreel preserves architecture by default — Enhance Mode is the default mode; restyle/staging is opt-in. Also adds video, voiceover, carousels, mobile app — virtual staging tools are typically image-only.
- vs. Photographer marketplaces (Aceable, HomeJab): Self-serve Studio means same-minute output. The Houston cinema crew partnership covers on-site shoots when needed; you don't choose between SaaS and crew.
- vs. AI image editors (Photoshop AI, Pixelmator): purpose-built for real estate listings (MLS-ready outputs, listing description AI, multi-platform aspect ratios) instead of general image editing.
- vs. Video agencies: monthly subscription pricing eliminates per-project bidding; cinema crew option for properties that warrant it.

## Differentiators
1. Architecture-preserving Enhance Mode (default) — virtual staging is opt-in only, never automatic
2. Self-serve credits AND done-for-you team AND on-site cinema crew under one brand
3. Multi-format delivery (MLS, Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts) included in every output
4. Three-language support (English, Italian, Spanish) for the AI voiceover and listing descriptions
5. Native mobile app launching free (iOS + Android, beta)
6. Houston-local cinema crew with Netflix-approved camera and lens packages

## Proof / ROI Signals
- Portfolio: https://unreelestate.com/portfolio (14 before/after pairs across exterior, entryway, openspace, living, kitchen, masterbath, rooftop, bedroom, bathroom, backyard, pool, townhome, office, dining)
- Delivery claims: self-serve immediate, team 24-48h, cinema crew 48-72h post-shoot
- Multi-format output: MLS, Zillow, Realtor.com, Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts
- Galli Productions partnership: Netflix-approved cinema cameras (Sony Venice / Alexa Mini), 4K aerial drone, on-site editor and colorist

## Languages
English, Italian (Italiano), Spanish (Español)
